name: Lowcoder
tagline: Lowcoder (forked from OpenBlocks) is a self-hosted, open-source, low-code platform for building internal tools.
description:
Lowcoder (forked from OpenBlocks) is a self-hosted, open-source, low-code platform for building internal tools.

Docs: https://docs.lowcoder.cloud/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  lowcoder:
    image: lowcoderorg/lowcoder-ce
    environment:
      - LOWCODER_EMAIL_SIGNUP_ENABLED=${LOWCODER_EMAIL_SIGNUP_ENABLED:-true}
      - LOWCODER_DB_ENCRYPTION_PASSWORD=9653fe125bde45d88666bbfdb7a2587a
      - LOWCODER_DB_ENCRYPTION_SALT=d69a66277d9efa9120f82b5710764ac9
    volumes:
      - lowcoder_data:/lowcoder-stacks
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -f
        - http://127.0.0.1:3000/health
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 20s
      retries: 10
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42061:3000
volumes:
  lowcoder_data: null
